## Content Checklist
- [ ] Article content reviewed
- [ ] Cover image exists and renders correctly
- [ ] Tags are appropriate
- [ ] No broken links/images
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete (excerpt, readTime, tags)

## Testing
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] `npm run build`
